text.title: Seven Performance Domains (PMBOK 8) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the program governed under PMBOK 8 (or transitioning to it)?

conclusion.verdict: Assign missing domain owners before status reporting

branch.when: pmbok_governance == true AND owner_count == 7 AND value_metric_present == false

conclusion.verdict: Add value-realisation metric to next status report

branch.when: pmbok_governance == true AND owner_count == 7 AND value_metric_present == true

conclusion.verdict: Verify each domain has a written baseline

example.trace: pmbok_governance=true → owner_count=7 → value_metric_present=true → baseline check passes → status reporting begins.
